name: get_syt_balance
description: Get the sUSDC balance for a wallet address. Defaults to the agent's own wallet if no address is provided. Run: node scripts/getSYTBalance.js [address]

address.description: EVM wallet address to check (optional — omit to check the agent's own wallet)

name: mint_syt
description: Deposit USDC into autoHODL to receive yield-bearing sUSDC. Handles USDC approval automatically on first use. Run: node scripts/mintSYT.js <amount>

name: transfer_syt
description: Send USDC to a recipient via sUSDC. The recipient receives plain USDC — not a yield token. Run: node scripts/transferSYT.js <recipient> <amount>
